hero.description: Connect directly with verified saree manufacturers from Surat & Varanasi. No middlemen. Better margins.

how.title: How It Works
how.step1_desc: Manufacturer ya wholesaler — apna account banao, 2 minutes mein.
how.step2_desc: LoomLink verified manufacturers se directly link karata hai wholesalers ko.
how.step3_desc: WhatsApp pe deal karo, seedha manufacturer se. No brokerage.

why.title: Why LoomLink?
why.p1_desc: Manufacturer se seedha deal — commission zero, margin zyada.
why.p2_desc: UP, Bihar, Gujarat ke wholesalers ab Surat-Varanasi se directly source kar sakte hain.
why.p3_desc: Verified manufacturers, genuine catalogues, transparent pricing.

footer.tagline: Manufacturer se seedha — bina beech wale ke
